intro: Major semiconductor manufacturers including Samsung, SK Hynix, Sandisk, Kioxia, and Micron are expanding DRAM and NAND flash production capacity, with new facilities expected online in late 2027 or 2028 to address growing AI demand. Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging theft of trade secrets, citing allegations ranging from unauthorized system access to requests that job candidates bring Apple hardware to interviews. Apple is also rolling out an AI-enhanced version of Siri through the iOS 27 public beta, positioning the assistant as a central part of the iPhone experience.
